# A Fragrance that Awakens

## Scripture

"Let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father who is in heaven."  
Matthew 5:16 (ESV)

## Reflection

Just as the perfect roast develops its distinctive aroma, so too should our faith radiate a fragrance that draws others to God. The brew of our lives – a blend of trials, mercies, and relationships – should be poured out in service to others. As we engage in the extraction process of our daily routines, let us not forget the essential ingredient: love. Just as a delicate pour-over requires attention to detail, so too does our witness demand intentional living. As we roast in the heat of adversity, may our crema of character be a manifestation of God's glory. The morning ritual of prayer and Scripture should be our daily grind, fueling us to shine His light in the world.

## Prayer

We ask that You would awaken in us a fragrance that draws others to You, and that our lives, like a perfectly brewed cup, would bring Your glory to all who encounter us.

## One-Line Application

May our faith be a fragrance that inspires others to give glory to God.
